channel.title: Phys on David's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Phys on David's Blog

item.title: Trunk 和 Vlan - Lab 笔记
item.description: 1. Switchport Access Mode vs Trunk Mode As a general case, freshers in networking domain tend to come across TRUNK and ACCESS terminologies in Switching. Trunk ports are generally used in the switch to switch communication or switch to Router (Router on a stick). Trunks carry multiple Vlans across devices and maintain VLAN tags in Ethernet frames for receiving directly connected device differentiates between different Vlans. Access ports are part

item.title: 傅立叶变换之rect, sinc, delta 函数 - 课堂笔记
item.description: 几个基础函数 做傅立叶相关计算题的时候遇到几个奇怪的函数, Unit Impulse function (Delta function) Unit Step function u(t), u(t-3) rect和sinc function, 它俩是一对Fourier Transform Pair 研究这几个函数之

item.title: 不定积分和卷积 Graphical Convolution - 课堂笔记
item.description: 1. 不定积分 注意区分复合函数求导, 求不定积分步骤: 选出 u 和 v, 求出 du, dv, 选择的时候要考虑 v 的原函数好不好找, 再根据以上公式, 带入 u, v, du, dv, 再看个例子
